title: Coolify deploy matrix for site, auth, tracker, nexus, pckg
body:
Document and verify one-click deploy paths per service with shared auth hub secrets, explicit ports, and per-service OpenBao paths.

## Landed

- Canonical matrix: [`beskid_infra/docs/deploy-matrix.md`](beskid_infra/docs/deploy-matrix.md)
- Cross-links from service `COOLIFY.md` files (site, auth, tracker, nexus, pckg)
- OpenBao layout: [`beskid_infra/docs/openbao-layout.md`](beskid_infra/docs/openbao-layout.md)

## Remaining

- Operator verification of production URLs and shared `AUTH_HUB_PUBLIC_URL` / `SESSION_SECRET` across consumers
- Staging compose (phase 2) documentation when enabled

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `platform-docs-dx`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

subtasks.text: deploy-matrix.md with URLs, ports, OpenBao paths
